name: Reflex Happy Hour Cat Treat Cocktail 60g
shortDescription: Reflex Happy Hour Cocktail Cat Treats combine taste and nutrition in every bite! These crunchy, vitamin-rich morsels are a wholesome complementary food designed to keep your adult cat happy and healthy.
description: Give your feline friend the ultimate reward with Reflex Happy Hour Cocktail Cat Treats delicious, crunchy morsels designed to delight your cat’s taste buds while promoting overall wellbeing. These premium treats are made with high-quality proteins, including salmon, lamb, and chicken, offering a rich source of essential nutrients that support your cat’s daily health. Perfect for rewarding good behavior or simply showing your pet some extra love, Reflex Happy Hour Cat Treats are free from artificial preservatives and fillers. Their satisfying crunchy texture helps maintain healthy teeth and gums, while their irresistible flavor ensures even the pickiest cats come back for more. Available in a variety of tasty flavors, these treats make every moment a celebration — because with Reflex, every hour can be a happy hour! Key Features Crunchy texture supports dental health Packed with essential vitamins and minerals Made from premium animal proteins for optimal nutrition No artificial additives or fillers Ideal as a complementary reward food for adult cats Ingredients Processed salmon protein, Processed lamb protein, Processed chicken protein, Corn, Chicken fat, Corn gluten, Salmon oil, Fish flavor, Powdered cellulose, Vitamins and minerals, Brewer's yeast, Salt, Blueberry, Flaxseed, Cranberry, Yucca schidigera, Xylooligosaccharides (XOS), Taurine (3a370), Preservatives and antioxidants (E320 & E321). Nutrient Composition Crude Protein: 32% Fat Content: 16% Ash: 3% Crude Fiber: 8% Moisture Content: 10% Feeding Recommendations For adult cats, Reflex Happy Hour Treats can be given as a complementary snack alongside their regular meals. The daily serving may vary depending on your cat’s age, activity level, and environment. Ensure fresh drinking water is always available. Store in a cool, dry place and reseal the packaging properly after each feeding.
